canonical_filename.mechanism: SKILL.md (required, fixed name per the Agent Skills standard)

custom_filename.mechanism: filename is fixed as SKILL.md per the Agent Skills standard

description.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: description (required); documents what the skill does and when Crush should invoke it

disable_model_invocation.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: disable-model-invocation (optional boolean) per the Agent Skills standard

display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required); follows the Anthropic Agent Skills standard

providerExtensions.name: Anthropic Agent Skills standard frontmatter
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter follows the Agent Skills open standard (agentskills.io) with name, description, license, compatibility, metadata, and disable-model-invocation fields.

providerExtensions.name: Cross-provider skill discovery
providerExtensions.summary: Crush discovers skills from .agents/skills/ (cross-provider convention) in addition to .crush/skills/ (native) and ~/.config/crush/skills/ (user global).
